    - Reviewed the marketing strategies and upcoming campaigns.

    - Discussed the sales projections and customer feedback.

- content: "Meeting Agenda - May 15, 2024
1. Welcome and Introductions
2. Review\
    \ of Previous Meeting Minutes
3. Project Updates
  - Development Team
  - Marketing\
    \ Team

4. New Business

args.subject: Action Item: Coordinate development team — Due 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

This is a reminder of your action item from the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024): please coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project. Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please reply to confirm you’ve started and share a brief initial plan (milestones, owners, and any blockers) by the deadline.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action Item: Send meeting agenda to John Mitchell — Due 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

This is a reminder of your action item from the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024): please email the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review. Deadline: 2024-05-21.

I’ve attached the agenda file to this message — please send it to John and reply here once you’ve sent it (include any reply you receive).

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action Item: Review sales projections — Due 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

This is a reminder of your action item from the Team Meeting (May 17, 2024): please review the sales projections and provide your feedback. Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Please send your comments or an annotated copy of the projections to me (or reply to this email) with specific suggestions or concerns.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
